title: Duck Colouring Toilet Rim Block, Foaming Toilet Bowl Cleaner, Long-lasting Fragrance, Mango Verse, 36g
features: Toilet Duck makes your Toilet Bright, White and Dirt-Free

Level up your freshness: Dive into a fragrant gaming adventure with Duck Mango Verse toilet rim blocks These provide powerful freshness and a captivating emerald hue with every flush, turning your toilet into a fresh gaming realm
Limited edition fragrance alert Embark on a fabulous Mango Verse Scent featuring notes of mango, magnolia and pineapple; Dont wait, supplies are limited
Colors water emerald for up to 300 flushes like a gaming pro; Colouring water emerald and helps keep clean freshness on a time-limited mission
Prevents limescale and helps keep clean your bathroom game Become the hero of your bathroom freshness with the new Duck Colouring rim block

Easy to use: just like nailing a gaming combo Use the hook to attach Duck Mango Verse to your toilet bowl, and voila fragrant upgrade; It's a gaming experience for your senses, levelling up every flush
description: Product Description GET THAT FRESH HOME FEELING, Elevate your senses and your toilet cleaning routine with our exciting new limited-edition scent, Mango-Verse; Duck Mango-Verse Colouring Rim Block isn't just a product; it's your gateway to a fragrant gaming realm; Level up your bathroom experience, hang that rim block, and let the fragrance quest begin; Duck Mango-Verse Colouring Rim Block has a unique formula that colours the water orange, and helps keep things clean while freshening with every single flush; So if your wings are strong enough to press down a flushing lever, this product is perfect for you; So just to rewind, this Duck toilet rim block helps to clean toilet bowl stains, and gets rid of any bathroom bacteria and bathroom germs; Easy to use and ready to be your player two in the battle for bathroom freshness, these toilet rim blocks are like the co-op mode you've been waiting for; Attach one to your toilet bowl, and with every flush, score a fragrant victoryhang it and earn freshness points in the game of bathroom freshness; Escape reality in this immersing Mango-Verse experience - as long as supplies last; Duck Mango-Verse is an achievement unlocked, Fruity scents of mango, magnolia and pineapple will break the boredom of your toilet cleaning game - So, start keeping your toilet air smelling fresh for longer with the limited edition, Duck Mango-Verse Active Colouring Rim Blocks; You can also level up your toilet routine by unlocking a limited-time interactive experience that turns bathroom breaks into a mobile game, Try both fragrances to open a new gaming-experience Ingredients 3,7-dimethyloctan-3-ol Manufacturer Contact Information SC Johnson Ltd., Camberley, GU16 7AJ.
